description: S36: File Upload UI - Add file_picker and image_picker to pubspec.yaml, create FileUploadWidget with bottom sheet (2x2 grid of options: Photo, Camera, File, Scan), file preview row above input bar, and integrate into chat_screen.dart replacing the + button.
steps: Add file_picker: ^8.1.2 and image_picker: ^1.1.2 to dependencies in frontend/pubspec.yaml

Create frontend/lib/presentation/widgets/chat/file_upload_widget.dart with: (a) FileUploadWidget StatefulWidget that shows + button, (b) On tap shows bottom sheet with bgSecondary background, 20px top border radius, 24px padding, (c) Title 'Add to chat' in DM Serif Display 18px bold, (d) 2x2 GridView of option tiles (Photo/Camera/File/Scan) each with bgTertiary background, radiusMedium border radius, 1px borderDefault, 16px padding, column centered with icon 28px in persian color, 8px gap, label in DM Sans 13px, (e) Photo option uses ImagePicker().pickImage(source: ImageSource.gallery), (f) Camera option uses ImagePicker().pickImage(source: ImageSource.camera), (g) File option uses FilePicker.platform.pickFiles with allowed extensions [pdf, docx, txt, md, csv, py, js, ts, dart, json, yaml], (h) Scan option uses ImagePicker camera for doc scanning, (i) Free users see lock icon with 'Upgrade to attach files' text on options

Add file preview widget section in file_upload_widget.dart that shows above the input bar when a file is selected: (a) Container with bgSecondary, radiusMedium, 1px borderDefault, padding 10px 12px, (b) Row with file type icon (image thumbnail 48x48 or doc icon in persian), 8px gap, Column with filename truncated (DM Sans 13px w500) and file size in KB/MB (DM Sans 11px textMuted), Spacer, Remove X button (Icons.close 16px textMuted), (c) On send: placeholder for POST /files/upload then include file_id in message

Update frontend/lib/presentation/screens/chat/chat_screen.dart: (a) Import FileUploadWidget, (b) Add state variable for selected files (List of picked file info), (c) Replace the existing GestureDetector + button with FileUploadWidget passing callbacks, (d) Show file preview above the input bar when files are selected, (e) Clear files after message sent
acceptance_criteria: file_upload_widget.dart exists with proper bottom sheet UI showing 2x2 grid
Each option tile has correct styling (bgTertiary, radiusMedium, 16px padding, persian icon)
File preview row shows filename, size, remove button with correct styling
chat_screen.dart imports and uses FileUploadWidget instead of raw + button
State management for selected files exists in chat_screen
No dynamic types, strict null safety throughout
verification: Review file_upload_widget.dart for correct imports, null safety, no dynamic types
Review chat_screen.dart for proper integration of FileUploadWidget
Verify pubspec.yaml has both new dependencies added correctly
